title: Flying Tree
description: Punch a tree to make it fly and drop as items.
body:
# Flying Tree Plugin

A plugin that makes trees fly into the sky when you hit them (left-click).

After flying a certain distance, the trees fall back to the ground and turn into blocks.

It's also a handy plugin for easily harvesting wood :D


This plugin was created using Google's Gemini.

The code is available on [Github](https://github.com/Harunanoda/FlyingTreePlugin).

- Game Version 1.21~1.21.11 (Paper)
